summary: manage multiple Codex ChatGPT auth snapshots

flags.description: show help
print the installed version
enable debug logging
print saved account names for shell completion
run codex with a saved account snapshot in an isolated runtime
switch to the best available account
add account with device-code login
show the selected account without switching
skip confirmation and force the action
include per-day usage breakdown
print JSON output
set the local account name for import
watch without switching accounts automatically
set the owning process id for a created overlay
write output to the given file
set the local proxy host
set the local proxy port
run codex with an isolated synthetic proxy auth
refresh quota data before printing
select the embedded usage summary window
show expanded score inputs and diagnostics
select the usage summary window
add account by reading an API key from stdin
skip removal confirmation

notes: In an interactive terminal, running plain codexm opens the account dashboard; use "codexm tui [query]" for an explicit entry or initial filter.
codexm current keeps the live runtime identity and shows best-effort quota from the proxy aggregate, direct runtime, or the saved managed snapshot.
codexm doctor checks local auth, direct app-server probes, and managed Desktop consistency.

codexm list refreshes quota data, shows the current managed account, marks current rows with "*", and marks the configured proxy upstream row with "@" while proxy mode is enabled; if refresh fails it can reuse the account-scoped last good quota snapshot for up to 7 days and tag the row as stale; use --refresh to ensure a background auth refresh and --verbose to expand score inputs.
codexm launch starts Codex Desktop on macOS and ensures the shared background daemon is running.
codexm autoswitch enable turns on daemon-backed auto-switching; disable leaves the baseline daemon running.

codexm proxy enable installs a synthetic ChatGPT auth pointed at the local proxy while preserving the live provider identity; while proxy stays enabled, codexm switch updates the proxy's current upstream, later autoswitch events can move it after quota exhaustion signals, and proxy websocket turns plus buffered REST requests can replay once on quota exhaustion before user-visible or side-effectful output starts.
codexm export writes a share bundle for the current auth or a managed account; codexm import saves a shared bundle without switching current auth.

codexm tui opens an interactive account dashboard for filtering, switching, reloading the current account, sharing bundles, deleting accounts, undoing the latest import/export/delete, and opening codex or Desktop from the selected account.
Run codexm launch from an external terminal if you need to restart Codex Desktop.
Unknown commands and flags fail fast; close matches include a suggestion.

description.en: add a new managed account snapshot
description.zh-CN: 新增一个托管账号快照

description.en: save the currently active auth as a named snapshot
description.zh-CN: 把当前生效的 auth 保存成命名快照

description.en: overwrite an existing saved snapshot with a new login or API key source
description.zh-CN: 用新的登录结果或 API key 原地覆盖已保存快照

description.en: refresh the saved snapshot for the current managed account
description.zh-CN: 刷新当前托管账号对应的已保存快照

description.en: rename a saved snapshot
description.zh-CN: 重命名已保存快照

description.en: exclude a saved snapshot from automatic switch target selection
description.zh-CN: 将已保存快照排除出自动切换候选

description.en: restore a saved snapshot to automatic switch target selection
description.zh-CN: 恢复已保存快照进入自动切换候选

description.en: remove a saved snapshot
description.zh-CN: 删除已保存快照

description.en: export the current auth or a saved snapshot as a share bundle
description.zh-CN: 把当前 auth 或已保存快照导出成分享 bundle

description.en: import a share bundle as a named managed account
description.zh-CN: 把分享 bundle 导入成命名托管账号

description.en: preview bundle metadata before importing
description.zh-CN: 导入前预览 bundle 元数据

description.en: open the interactive account dashboard when running in a TTY
description.zh-CN: 在交互式终端里直接打开账号面板

description.en: show the current account plus best-effort quota
description.zh-CN: 查看当前账号和尽力获取的 quota 摘要

description.en: diagnose local auth, runtime probes, and managed Desktop consistency
description.zh-CN: 诊断本地 auth、runtime 探测和托管 Desktop 一致性

description.en: show saved accounts plus an embedded local usage summary
description.zh-CN: 查看所有保存账号，并附带一行本地 usage 摘要

description.en: show one saved account in detail, including email, identity, quota, and the selected local usage window
description.zh-CN: 查看单个已保存账号的详情，包括邮箱、identity、quota 和所选本地 usage 窗口

description.en: machine-readable output, including proxy current-upstream metadata and last-upstream metadata when available
description.zh-CN: 输出机器可读 JSON；包含 proxy 当前上游信息，以及有数据时最近一次上游命中信息

description.en: include diagnostic details about quota normalization and observed ratios
description.zh-CN: 输出 quota 归一化和观测比例相关诊断信息

description.en: inspect the local proxy daemon and synthetic auth mode
description.zh-CN: 查看本地 proxy daemon 和 synthetic auth 状态

description.en: inspect the shared background daemon, enabled features, and log path
description.zh-CN: 查看共享后台 daemon、已启用能力和日志路径

description.en: inspect whether daemon-backed auto-switching is enabled
description.zh-CN: 查看 daemon 驱动的自动切号是否已启用

description.en: explicitly open the account dashboard, optionally with an initial filter; Enter on the proxy row toggles proxy on or off
description.zh-CN: 显式打开账号面板，可选带初始筛选词；在 proxy 行上按 Enter 会切换 proxy 开关

description.en: summarize local token usage and estimated cost from session logs
description.zh-CN: 从本地 session 日志汇总 token usage 和 estimated cost

description.en: switch to a saved direct account; with proxy enabled, this immediately becomes the proxy's current upstream until a later autoswitch event changes it
description.zh-CN: 切换到指定保存的 direct 账号；若 proxy 已启用，这会立刻成为 proxy 的当前上游，直到后续 autoswitch 事件再把它切走

description.en: preview the best auto-switch candidate
description.zh-CN: 预览自动切号会选中的账号

description.en: launch Codex Desktop on macOS and ensure the shared daemon is running
description.zh-CN: 在 macOS 上启动 Codex Desktop，并确保共享 daemon 已启动

description.en: watch quota changes and auto-switch on exhaustion
description.zh-CN: 监听 quota 变化，并在耗尽时自动切号

description.en: enable daemon-backed auto-switching, including proxy replay before user-visible output starts on quota exhaustion
description.zh-CN: 启用 daemon 驱动的自动切号；proxy 在用户可见输出开始前遇到耗尽时也会内部重放一次

description.en: disable auto-switching while keeping the baseline daemon alive
description.zh-CN: 关闭自动切号，并保留基础 daemon 常驻

description.en: start the shared background daemon without enabling extra features
description.zh-CN: 启动共享后台 daemon，但不额外启用附加能力

description.en: stop the shared background daemon while preserving the last daemon feature state
description.zh-CN: 停止共享后台 daemon，并保留最近一次 daemon 功能开关状态

description.en: run codex with global auth follow-restart or an isolated managed account snapshot
description.zh-CN: 以全局 auth 跟随重启模式运行 codex，或用托管账号快照做一次性隔离运行

description.en: run codex in an isolated CODEX_HOME through the local proxy
description.zh-CN: 用隔离 CODEX_HOME 通过本地 proxy 运行 codex

description.en: enable global synthetic ChatGPT auth backed by the local proxy, with one replay before user-visible output starts on proxy quota exhaustion
description.zh-CN: 启用由本地 proxy 提供的全局 synthetic ChatGPT auth；在 proxy 耗尽且用户可见输出尚未开始时会自动重放一次

description.en: restore the previous direct auth/config backup while leaving the shared proxy daemon state untouched
description.zh-CN: 恢复上一次 direct auth/config 备份，同时不改动共享 proxy daemon 的监听状态

description.en: create an isolated CODEX_HOME overlay for another tool to use
description.zh-CN: 为其他工具创建隔离的 CODEX_HOME overlay

intro.en: Generate a completion script and install it with your shell's standard mechanism:
intro.zh-CN: 按 shell 的标准方式生成并安装补全脚本：

outro.en: The generated scripts complete commands, known subcommands, flags when the current word starts with `-`, and saved account names by calling `codexm completion --accounts`.
outro.zh-CN: 生成的脚本会补全命令、已知二级命令、当前输入以 `-` 开头时的 flag，并通过 `codexm completion --accounts` 动态补全已保存账号名。
